description_long: This is a rustic, wooden bucket with an octagonal shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by two wide, dark metal bands. The wood has a rich brown color with visible grain patterns and subtle carved swirls, giving it a hand-crafted appearance. A single, thick, curved metal handle is attached to one side, designed for easy carrying and pouring. The metal bands are fastened with square rivets, reinforcing the structure and adding to its durability. The interior is open and hollow, suitable for holding liquids or small items. The overall design suggests it is both functional and decorative, fitting for use in urban settings such as taverns, markets, or parks.
description: A brown wooden bucket with metal bands and a large curved metal handle, featuring visible wood grain and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal wooden body with two metal bands and no visible handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large, curved metal handle attached to the bucket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden staves and metal bands, with the handle barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle fully visible, curving outward from the bucket.
